message:
feat(events,robot): add Ollama agent type tracking and normalize agent type parsing

Events:
- Add OllamaCount field to SessionCreateData for session creation events
- Include ollama_count in ToMap() serialization

Output schema:
- Add Other field to AgentCountsResponse for unrecognized agent types
- Add AddedOllama field to AddResponse

Robot token analytics:
- Add ollama to aggregateTokenStats() agent spawn tracking
- Add isTrackedAgentType() helper centralizing the list of known agent types
- Refactor parseAgentTypes() from substring-contains matching to proper
  comma-delimited token parsing with canonical normalization, deduplication,
  and support for pane:/tags: prefixed selectors
- Handle "all-agents" as a legacy all-types alias alongside "all"/"agents"

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -90,6 +90,7 @@ type SessionCreateData struct {
 	CursorCount   int    `json:"cursor_count,omitempty"`
 	WindsurfCount int    `json:"windsurf_count,omitempty"`
 	AiderCount    int    `json:"aider_count,omitempty"`
+	OllamaCount   int    `json:"ollama_count,omitempty"`
 	WorkDir       string `json:"work_dir,omitempty"`
 	Recipe        string `json:"recipe,omitempty"`
 }
@@ -137,6 +138,7 @@ func ToMap(v interface{}) map[string]interface{} {
 			"cursor_count":   d.CursorCount,
 			"windsurf_count": d.WindsurfCount,
 			"aider_count":    d.AiderCount,
+			"ollama_count":   d.OllamaCount,
 			"work_dir":       d.WorkDir,
 			"recipe":         d.Recipe,
 		}

@@ -91,6 +91,7 @@ type AgentCountsResponse struct {
 	Windsurf int `json:"windsurf"`
 	Aider    int `json:"aider"`
 	User     int `json:"user,omitempty"`
+	Other    int `json:"other,omitempty"`
 	Total    int `json:"total"`
 }
 
@@ -139,6 +140,7 @@ type AddResponse struct {
 	AddedClaude   int            `json:"added_claude"`
 	AddedCodex    int            `json:"added_codex"`
 	AddedGemini   int            `json:"added_gemini"`
+	AddedOllama   int            `json:"added_ollama"`
 	AddedCursor   int            `json:"added_cursor"`
 	AddedWindsurf int            `json:"added_windsurf"`
 	AddedAider    int            `json:"added_aider"`

@@ -4519,7 +4519,10 @@ func TestParseAgentTypes(t *testing.T) {
 		{"agents keyword", "agents", []string{"claude", "codex", "gemini"}},
 		{"cursor", "cursor", []string{"cursor"}},
 		{"windsurf", "windsurf", []string{"windsurf"}},
+		{"windsurf short alias", "ws", []string{"windsurf"}},
 		{"aider", "aider", []string{"aider"}},
+		{"ollama", "ollama", []string{"ollama"}},
+		{"modern aliases and dedupe", "openai-codex,ws,ollama,codex", []string{"codex", "windsurf", "ollama"}},
 		{"mixed case", "CC,CODEX", []string{"claude", "codex"}},
 	}
